hooks.command: repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" bash "$repo/.ai/hooks/run-hook.sh" session-start-context.sh
repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" bash "$repo/.ai/hooks/run-hook.sh" worktree-guard.sh
repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" bash "$repo/.ai/hooks/run-hook.sh" pre-edit-guard.sh
repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" bash "$repo/.ai/hooks/run-hook.sh" post-edit-guard.sh
repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" bash "$repo/.ai/hooks/run-hook.sh" post-bash.sh
repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" bash "$repo/.ai/hooks/run-hook.sh" trace-event.sh
repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" bash "$repo/.ai/hooks/run-hook.sh" context-pressure-hook.sh
repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" bash "$repo/.ai/hooks/run-hook.sh" prompt-guard.sh
repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" bash "$repo/.ai/hooks/run-hook.sh" finalize-handoff.sh
